items.title: Diffing two EXPLAIN plans as trees, not text

items.title: Your runtimes have an expiry date. I baked the EOL calendar into the app so it works offline.
items.description:
Every runtime and piece of middleware you run has a quiet expiry date. PHP 8.0
went EOL in late 2023. Node 16 in 2023. Postgres 12 in 2024. After that: no
security patches. The problem is never "we didn't know EOL was a thing" — it's that
the EOL calendar lives in a dozen vendor pages

items.title: The Repo Is the Context: Why Agents Don’t Need History
items.description:
History still matters. I just don't want it to be the default context for agents editing the present system.

A coding agent will read whatever you put in front of it.

That sounds like a strength. Most of the time it is the problem.

items.title: Hashing vs Encryption: la differenza che fa davvero la sicurezza
items.description:
